design_philosophy: High-end gallery-style light mode. Crisp studio whites, silver finishes, muted slate accents. Pure monochrome spectrum. Advanced glass-morphic architecture, ultra-fine borders, soft ambient shadows. Zero image files; everything is a coded UI component.

primary_font.usage: All structural headers, navigation, buttons, and paragraphs.

secondary_font.usage: All data points, percentages, timestamps, metrics, technical labels, and simulated dashboard numbers.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-medium tracking-tighter leading-tight text-zinc-950

surface_styles.cards: bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm

specifics.staggered_reveal: Use variants with staggerChildren: 0.1, initial { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate { opacity: 1, y: 0 }
specifics.magnetic_buttons: Wrap buttons in a framer-motion component tracking mouse position for subtle x/y shifts (max 10px) on hover.
specifics.card_3d_tilt: onMouseMove calculates relative mouse X/Y center. map to rotateX and rotateY (range -5deg to 5deg). Reset to 0 onMouseLeave.
specifics.light_sweep: Use a subtle linear gradient pseudo-element that translates across the card based on mouse position or loops on hover.
specifics.number_count_up: Use framer-motion useInView and animate() to count from 0 to target number.

navigation.layout: Fixed top, floating dock. rounded-full mx-auto mt-6 px-6 py-3 max-w-fit flex items-center gap-8
navigation.logo: APEX typographic logo. font-sans font-bold tracking-tighter text-xl

hero.layout: text-center pt-32 pb-20 flex flex-col items-center gap-8
hero.headline: Premium, highly condensed. E.g. 'The Operating System for Elite Dealerships.'
hero.ctas: Primary CTA: 'Request Access' (solid black, opens modal). Secondary: 'View Capabilities' (ghost with border).
hero.mockup: Coded UI dashboard below the hero text. A window containing a sidebar (left 20%), main content area (right 80%). Inside: simulated charts (using div heights), recent leads list (font-mono data points), active inventory metrics. ALL pure code (divs, spans), strict monochrome, high-end gallery feel.

metrics_bar.layout: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 py-12 border-y border-black/5
metrics_bar.content: Three main metrics: '+38% Closing Rate', '-45m Response Time', '100% Inventory Control'. Use JetBrains Mono for numbers. Apply framer-motion count-up.

core_capabilities.interaction: 3D perspective tilt on hover, with a sheer gradient light sweep.

comparison_table.layout: Minimalist table, no vertical borders. Generous padding.
comparison_table.style: Headers in Inter Tight, data/features in font-mono if technical. Checkmarks for APEX, empty/minus for legacy.

logo_ticker.style: Monochrome text-only typographic logos (CDK Global, Lightspeed, Elead) with varying font weights/styles to simulate logos without images. Very low contrast text (text-zinc-300).
logo_ticker.animation: react-fast-marquee or framer-motion infinite translate-x loop.

request_access_modal.style: Glassmorphic overlay (bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-sm). Modal card: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 border border-black/5 shadow-2xl.
request_access_modal.form: Minimal inputs (Name, Dealership, Volume). Coded with Shadcn-like customized inputs (border-b only, or extremely soft ring). Solid black submit button.

footer.layout: Massive top padding (py-32). Minimalist structure. 2 columns: Brand info vs Legal links.
footer.style: bg-white border-t border-black/5. Subtle text. Huge 'APEX' watermark logo spanning the bottom.

media_and_assets.images: FORBIDDEN. Do not use img tags, next/image, or background images.
media_and_assets.icons: Use lucide-react (pure SVG components). Stroke width 1.5. Colors must be zinc-900 or zinc-400.
media_and_assets.logos: All partner logos in the ticker must be pure text/CSS typographic recreations.

testing_requirements.data_testids: Apply data-testid to ALL interactive elements. Examples: 'nav-request-access-button', 'hero-cta-primary', 'modal-close-button', 'submit-lead-form'.
